title: Popovers (Regular or Gluten-free)
ingredients: 4 large eggs, room temperature or warmed in shallow bowl of warm water for 10 minutes
1 ½ cups flour (or if gluten free, use 1 cup 1:1 GF flour and ½ cup rice flour)
instructions: Place all ingredients except butter in a blender.
Add butter and blend a few seconds.
Place batter in well oiled popover pan.
For steam oven: bake at Convection Steam setting 425 degrees F for 20 minutes, then reduce to 325 degrees for 12 minutes.
For regular oven: bake at 450 degrees F for 20 minutes, then reduce heat to 350 degrees and bake 10-15 minutes more.
Immediately remove popovers from pan after removing from oven.
Place a small slit in bottom of popovers to release steam and prevent them from collapsing.
Serve immediately with good butter, jam, or honey.
notes: Eggs can be warmed in shallow bowl of warm water for 10 minutes before using
For gluten-free version, use 1 cup 1:1 GF flour and ½ cup rice flour instead of regular flour
Make sure popover pan is well oiled before adding batter
Release steam immediately after baking to prevent popovers from collapsing
Serve immediately with good butter, jam, or honey for best results
